creator: ben@FreeBSD.org
text:
Udo Erdelhoff wrote: > Hi, >> Looks good to me, with one minor exception: the white space before the >> "pn=\@" line in is unnecessary. > > whitespace and linebreaks within a element are significant. > With the whitespace in front of the pn=\@, the output will be intended by > approximately one tab. Without it, it will start in column 0. Not in the HTML output I see. 
    pn=\@
That results from pn=\@, and I'd assume conversions to other formats get this right too. -- Ben Smithurst / ben@FreeBSD.org / PGP: 0x99392F7D FreeBSD Documentation Project /
